productDisplayName: Scullers Men White & Green Striped T-shirt
description: Style Notescullers extends its casual wear collection with another polo tee. With a green collar and striped torso with black, green and white, it only calls for pairing with shorts and flip flops to give you a casual and style studded look or just beat the heat of the summer by the pool.Product DescriptionWhite tee with black and green stripes and green spread collar, two button placket, short sleeved with ribbed cuffs and applique on the left chestMaterial and Care100%  CottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSizeRelaxed FitThe model ( height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size XL
